name: Ill Gotten Gains
overview: Looking at how Regional Organised Crime Units and Forces are taking down Britain's criminals by confiscating their assets as 'Proceeds of Crime' and selling them at auction. Each show focuses on a proceeds of crime auction, with experts and law enforcement personnel helping us to understand more about Proceeds of Crime, the items confiscated and the crimes behind the 'Ill Gotten Gains.'

trailers.title: BBC crime series "Ill Gotten Gains" featuring the Purejunk track "Investigation"
